blocker: 149 active semantic proposal fingerprints already belong to other neighborhood batches; the active-fingerprint uniqueness constraint prevents inserting CTS batch rows, while the existing persistence implementation would overwrite those rows and their metadata.
safetyDisposition: Persistence aborted before persistProposals and before any canonical mutation. Guarded dry run, real apply, strict reload, and strict audit were not run because they require exact persisted batch membership.
requiredDecision: The current schema has no non-destructive way to associate an existing semantic proposal fingerprint with an additional batch. Completing the lifecycle requires explicit authorization for a minimal batch-membership representation or an explicit waiver permitting prior proposal rows to be reassigned; reassignment is not recommended.
